task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged into and accessed the graphical email client.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The email client interface (e.g., webmail or desktop client) is open and visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify a new folder named 'Recovered-Critical' was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A folder exactly named 'Recovered-Critical' is visible in the email client's folder list or sidebar.

task_completion.description: Verify emails from 'exmh-workers' and 'ILUG' were moved to the new folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Recovered-Critical' folder is shown containing emails where the sender, subject, or mailing list indicates 'exmh-workers' or 'ILUG'.

task_completion.description: Verify that other, non-target emails were left in the Trash folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Trash folder during or after the move show that it is not empty; unselected/non-target emails remain in the Trash.

task_completion.description: Verify a confirmation email was drafted to the manager with the correct subject.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An email composition window is open with 'ops-manager@techcorp.org' in the 'To' field and 'Recovery Complete' in the 'Subject' field.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the graphical email client to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Actions like creating folders, moving emails, and drafting messages are done through the email GUI, not via terminal commands (e.g., 'mv' or 'cp').

integrity.description: Ensure the email draft is created in the actual email client.
integrity.visual_evidence: The draft to the ops-manager is composed in the email client's native composition window, not in a standalone text editor like Notepad or Nano.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not use scripts to bypass manual GUI filtering.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows showing bash, python, or grep scripts being executed to automatically sort or move the emails behind the scenes.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target recovery folder name: 'Recovered-Critical'. Target mailing lists to recover: 'exmh-workers' and 'ILUG' (Irish Linux Users Group). There are 17 target emails in total. Manager email for confirmation: 'ops-manager@techcorp.org'.
